features.title: Evaluation Schema Update
features.description: Add codex_detection object to review_findings in the NN-evaluation.json schema in patterns.md. Update the NN-evaluation.md template Code Review section to include detection fields.
steps: Read plugins/harness/skills/harness/references/patterns.md
Verify NN-evaluation.json schema contains review_findings.codex_detection object
Verify codex_detection has fields: config_use_codex, settings_codex_enabled, detection_result, fallback_reason
Verify NN-evaluation.md template Code Review section includes detection fields
Grep for 'codex_detection' in patterns.md to confirm presence
evidence: Sprint 1: codex_detection object added to review_findings schema; NN-evaluation.md template updated with detection fields
features.notes: Schema-first: other features reference this schema.

features.title: Evaluator Codex Pre-Flight
features.description: Rewrite agents/evaluator.md codex detection from descriptive bullets to a mandatory sequential pre-flight section (Section 0) before the testing section. Add SDLC skill reference to evaluator read list.
steps: Read plugins/harness/agents/evaluator.md
Verify a 'Section 0' or 'Pre-Flight' section exists before the testing section
Verify the section contains mandatory sequential codex detection steps
Verify the read list includes harness-sdlc/SKILL.md
Grep for 'pre-flight' or 'Pre-Flight' in evaluator.md
evidence: Sprint 2: Pre-flight section added at line 26 before Testing. harness-sdlc added to read list. Old codex bullets replaced.

features.title: Evaluator Role Mirror
features.description: Mirror the pre-flight changes in skills/harness/roles/evaluator.md. Add harness-sdlc to the Read list. Replace descriptive codex bullets with reference to pre-flight.
steps: Read plugins/harness/skills/harness/roles/evaluator.md
Verify pre-flight section or reference exists
Verify harness-sdlc is in the Read list
Verify descriptive codex bullets have been replaced
Grep for 'pre-flight' or 'harness-sdlc' in roles/evaluator.md
evidence: Sprint 3: Pre-flight section mirrored from evaluator.md. harness-sdlc added to Read list. Old codex bullets replaced.

features.title: Coordinator Enforcement
features.description: In agents/coordinator.md: add Codex Detection Enforcement section, expand sprint artifact checks from 3 to 5 (adding contract-review.md and evaluation.json), add context freshness trace logging. Mirror in roles/coordinator.md.
steps: Read plugins/harness/agents/coordinator.md
Verify Codex Detection Enforcement section exists
Verify 5 sprint artifacts are checked (including contract-review.md and evaluation.json)
Verify context freshness trace logging (rounds_since_reset) is present
Read plugins/harness/skills/harness/roles/coordinator.md and verify codex enforcement reference
Grep for 'contract-review.md' and 'evaluation.json' in coordinator.md
evidence: Sprint 4: Codex Detection Enforcement added. 5 artifacts enforced. Context freshness trace added. roles/coordinator.md updated.
features.notes: Modifies two files: agents/coordinator.md and roles/coordinator.md.

features.title: SKILL.md Runtime Verification
features.description: Strengthen the evaluator section of SKILL.md to require runtime verification (application starts and responds) for software-profile projects, not just build-only verification.
steps: Read plugins/harness/skills/harness/SKILL.md
Verify the evaluator section explicitly requires runtime verification
Verify the requirement applies specifically to software-profile projects
Verify build-only verification is explicitly insufficient
Grep for 'runtime verification' in SKILL.md
